pattern: Toggling a parity flag at every vertical bar tells you whether the current region is inside or outside a barred pair, so you only tally asterisks in outside regions.
hints: Reading left to right, the bars alternate between starting and ending a protected segment.
Keep a boolean that flips on each '|'; asterisks only count when that flag says you are outside a pair.
Scan once: flip an 'inside' flag at every bar, and increment the count for each '*' seen while not inside.

edge_inputs.description: asterisks both inside and outside pairs
all asterisks fall inside a single pair
single character that is an asterisk
asterisk just outside a closed pair

stress.description: long string of letters, bars and asterisks with an even bar count
stress.note: generator guarantees an even number of bars
